name: Fantasy FX
comment: The Eliminator Lighting Fantasy FX is a versatile dual-effect fixture combining a 40W RGBW center beam with a circular halo of 288 RGB SMD LEDs. Compact and lightweight, it features 128 programs, DMX control, 0–100% dimming, and up to 20 strobe flashes per second—perfect for DJs, nightclubs, and fun centers. Energize any event with vibrant, imaginative lighting!

capabilities.comment: Strobe Fast to Slow Main RGBW
Pulse Slow to Fast Main RGBW
Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast Main RGBW
Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast RGB
